reasons: The animal is clearly a German Shepherd Dog, which inherently falls into the large breed category. Based on the images, this specific individual exhibits heavy bone structure, a broad, deep chest, and a thick neck, which are highly indicative of a mature adult male. The side profile reveals a thick, barrel-shaped midsection with minimal tuck-up at the waist, suggesting a very robust, heavy-set build that is potentially carrying slightly more weight than a standard working condition. The sheer broadness across the back (visible in the rear view) and sturdy limbs further support a weight estimate at the higher end of the standard range for the breed, around 40 kg.
